title: ReCODE Medical Has Been Acquired
excerpt: Today we announced that ReCODE Medical — the AI medical-coding company I co-founded — has been acquired.

title: Weightless ONNX File Loader with ONNX2Torch
excerpt: I needed to convert an ONNX file back into fx.GraphModule IR without the memory overhead of the weights of a large model. This was the approach.

title: vLLM Paged Attention: Inter-Disciplinary Knowledge Matters
excerpt: Know how lots of problems are solved to help solve new ones.

title: Notes on a Spatial Architecture
excerpt: Finally building out my mental model on a flavor of spatial neural accelerator that is good for CNNs (not for transformers).

title: You.
excerpt: What is "you", and where does it reside? The information filter which you've acquired through a lifetime of experience. The sum of all the things you've seen, heard, felt, and thought boiled down into a lens which weaves together preconscious stimuli into the world-model you uniquely inhabit.
